mnemonics: IMA stands for Integrated Moving Average
keyPoints: T - Trend: The process is non-stationary due to the trend component.
I - Integration: The process is integrated, meaning the difference between consecutive observations is a stationary process.
G - Granger Causality: The integrated MA process is Granger-causality related to the non-stationary trend component.
E - Error Correction: The integrated MA process can be viewed as an error correction model.
R - Regression: The integrated MA process can be estimated using regression techniques.
